layout.workspaceSetupIssueBody: Unable to set up your workspace membership. Sign out and sign in again, then retry.
layout.workspaceSetupIssueSupport: If it keeps failing, contact support with your account email and request tenant bootstrap.

home.title: SnapConsent
home.subtitle: Consent collection, project invites, and photo linking for teams that need a clear workflow instead of a patchwork of folders and links.
home.openAppBody: Sign in to manage projects, invites, assets, and linked consents.
home.currentScopeBody: This build focuses on projects, consent invites, subject headshots, manual photo linking, and internal face-matching workflows.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your Supabase email and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage projects, send consent invites, and review linked photos from one workspace.
dashboard.recentProjectsEmpty: No projects yet. Create one to start sending invites.
dashboard.accountFooter: Consent operations stay tenant-scoped and protected by the server session.

list.title: Projects
list.subtitle: Organize photographers, invite subjects, and manage linked project photos from one place.
list.projectCount: {count, plural, one {# project in this workspace} other {# projects in this workspace}}

create.title: Create project
create.subtitle: Set up a new workspace for invites, consents, and photo matching.

defaultTemplate.title: Project default template
defaultTemplate.subtitle: Choose the template that should be preselected for new invites.
defaultTemplate.label: Default template

invites.title: Create subject invite
invites.subtitle: Generate a shareable consent form link for one subject.
invites.selectTemplateError: Select a consent template before creating an invite.

matchingProgress.title: Matching progress
matchingProgress.degradedNotice: Matching needs attention. Automatic retries are active or a continuation is stalled.

assetsList.filterHelp: Show photos linked to all selected people.
assetsList.previewLinkedPeopleEmpty: No linked people on this image yet.
assetsList.previewConsentPanelPlaceholder: Select a linked face to inspect the current consent details.
assetsList.previewDetectedFaceHelp: Select a person, then save to create the link.
assetsList.previewHiddenFaceHelp: This face is hidden from active preview and matching summaries.
assetsList.previewPickerEmpty: No eligible people are available for this image.
assetsList.previewMoveLinkedPersonWarning: Already linked on this image. Selecting will move it here.
assetsList.previewLoadError: Unable to load linked people for this image.
assetsList.previewCandidateLoadError: Unable to load people for change-person.
assetsList.previewChangePersonError: Unable to change the linked person.
assetsList.previewSaveFaceLinkError: Unable to save this face link.
assetsList.previewChangePersonConflict: This face is already manually assigned to another person.

errors.invalidHeadshot: Unable to replace headshot with this image.
errors.fallback: Unable to replace headshot right now.

detail.defaultTemplateWarning: This project default template is no longer available for new invites. Choose a new published template.
detail.subtitle: Manage consent invites, review subject details, and match project photos to signed consents.
detail.invitesSubtitle: Sent invites, signed consent details, headshots, and manual matching live here.
detail.structuredValuesLegacy: This signed consent does not include structured field values.
detail.assetsSubtitle: Upload project photos, filter large collections, and inspect linked subjects.

publicInvite.title: Consent form
publicInvite.receiptQueued: Consent saved. Receipt email will be retried.
publicInvite.cannotSubmit: This invite cannot accept new submissions.

errors.unavailable: This invite has already been used.
errors.server: Unable to submit consent right now. Please try again.
errors.headshot_required: Facial matching requires a valid uploaded headshot before consent submission.

form.structuredFieldsSubtitle: These selections are stored with your signed consent.
form.faceMatchOptIn: I consent to facial matching to help link photos where I appear.
form.headshotRequiredBody: Your headshot is stored privately for facial matching within this project and is automatically deleted after the retention period.

errors.enableFaceMatchBeforeUpload: Enable facial matching consent before uploading a headshot.
errors.skipUpload: Unable to upload this headshot. Please choose a different image.
errors.uploadNow: Unable to upload headshot right now.
errors.headshotRequiredBeforeSubmit: Upload a headshot before submitting when facial matching is enabled.
errors.consentAcknowledgementRequired: Confirm that you have read the consent statement and agree before submitting.

form.consentAcknowledgementLabel: I have read the consent statement and agree to its contents.

publicRevoke.title: Revoke consent
publicRevoke.subtitle: Use this page to revoke future processing for your consent.

list.title: Templates
list.subtitle: Create, publish, and maintain the consent templates used in your projects.
list.orgTemplatesSubtitle: Drafts, published versions, and archived history for this workspace.
list.appTemplatesSubtitle: Centrally maintained templates that can be used directly in your projects.

detail.structuredFieldsSubtitle: Built-in scope and duration are fixed semantics. Custom fields stay bounded to dropdowns, checkbox lists, and plain text.
detail.structuredFieldsLegacy: This template version uses the legacy consent form shape and has no structured fields definition.
detail.scopeFieldDescription: Required checkbox list. Signers must choose at least one allowed scope option.
detail.scopeFieldEmpty: Add at least one scope option before publishing.
detail.durationFieldDescription: Required single-select field. Choose which duration options signers can select.
detail.layoutSubtitle: Drag blocks to control the one-column public form order.
detail.previewSubtitle: Interact with the form, then run preview-only validation without saving or submitting.
detail.previewFieldErrorHeadshotRequired: Enable a mock headshot before confirming.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

codes.invalid_idempotency_key: Request could not be processed. Please retry.
codes.unauthenticated: You need to sign in first.
codes.consent_revoked: Revoked consents cannot receive new assignments.
codes.invalid_template_name: Template name must be between 2 and 120 characters.
codes.invalid_template_description: Template description must be 500 characters or fewer.
codes.invalid_template_category: Template category must be 80 characters or fewer.
codes.invalid_template_body: Template body must be between 20 and 20000 characters.
codes.structured_scope_required: Add at least one scope option before publishing.
codes.duplicate_structured_field_key: Each structured field key must be unique.
codes.duplicate_structured_option_key: Each option key must be unique within its field.
codes.template_publish_conflict: Another version was published first. Refresh and try again.
